name: Obligate
oneliner: On-chain issuance and trading of tokenised bonds and commercial paper under Swiss DLT Act — 720% annualised issuance growth.
finserv: Swiss DLT Act compliant; FINMA-supervised. Built for regulated institutional issuers and qualified buyers. Exponential Science Capital lead plus ~150 Republic Europe angels.
team: Ex-institutional capital-markets founders; the Swiss DLT Act wrapper is cleaner for tokenised debt than anything MiCA currently offers.
thesis: Corporate bond and commercial paper issuance is plumbing that has barely changed in 40 years. Obligate is among the very few European plays with live regulated issuance at meaningful pace — small AUM today but the regulatory path is unusually clean.
